title: Safety Signage
subtitle: A practical workplace safety and health programme focused on safety signage.
whyThisMatters: Safety Signage helps participants turn course concepts into practical workplace habits. The programme gives teams a shared foundation, clearer language, and guided practice so they can connect the subject to risk awareness, prevention, and responsible workplace behavior and apply the learning with more confidence after the workshop.
builtFor: Employees in operational, site-based, or technical roles
Supervisors responsible for daily safety practices
Teams that need stronger safety awareness and prevention habits
walkAwayWith: Recognize relevant workplace hazards and risk factors earlier.
Apply safer work practices and basic control measures.
Understand individual responsibility in safety, health, or environmental performance.
Support better reporting, prevention, and follow-through at work.

modules.title: Understanding safety signage as control measure
Overview of legal compliance in Malaysia and globally
Application of laws in your facility

methodologyCaption: The workshop uses workplace examples, discussion, and practical hazard-recognition activities to make safe behavior concrete.
